arguments.command: ls [workspace-path]
cat [workspace-path] && echo "---" && cat [workspace-path]
mkdir -p [workspace-path] && ls -la [workspace-path]
md5sum [workspace-path]

eog [workspace-path] &
sleep 3
agent-browser screenshot [workspace-path]

pkill -f eog 2>/dev/null; sleep 1
# Open file manager to show the source folder
nemo [workspace-path] &
sleep 4

nemo [workspace-path] &
sleep 5 && agent-browser screenshot [workspace-path]

which thunar nautilus pcmanfm dolphin xdg-open 2>/dev/null || echo "none found"
ls /usr/bin/*manager* 2>/dev/null || echo "no manager"

DISPLAY=:0 thunar [workspace-path] &
sleep 4
echo $DISPLAY && xdpyinfo 2>&1 | head -5

DISPLAY=:99 thunar [workspace-path] &
sleep 5
agent-browser screenshot [workspace-path]
DISPLAY=:99 scrot [workspace-path] 2>&1 && echo "done"

DISPLAY=:99 xwininfo -root -tree 2>&1 | head -20
DISPLAY=:99 xdotool getactivewindow 2>&1

# Thunar window is tiny (2x2) - let's resize and raise it
DISPLAY=:99 xdotool search --name "Thunar" windowsize 1200 800 windowmove 100 50 windowraise windowfocus
sleep 2
DISPLAY=:99 scrot [workspace-path]
echo "done"

DISPLAY=:99 xrandr 2>&1 | head -5
DISPLAY=:99 wmctrl -l 2>&1
ps aux | grep -E "openbox|fluxbox|xfwm|metacity|compiz|sawfish|twm|xterm|thunar" | grep -v grep

# Thunar is running with the folder. Let's get the window ID and properly map/raise it
DISPLAY=:99 wmctrl -ia 0x01c00007
sleep 1
DISPLAY=:99 wmctrl -ir 0x01c00007 -e 0,50,50,1300,800
sleep 2
DISPLAY=:99 scrot [workspace-path]
echo "done"
python3 -c "import pyautogui; img = pyautogui.screenshot(); img.save('[workspace-path]'); print('done', img.size)"

# Try using import_image from ImageMagick to grab the X display
DISPLAY=:99 import -window root [workspace-path] 2>&1 && echo "done"

which xwd xwdtopnm ffmpeg 2>/dev/null
# Try ffmpeg to capture X screen
DISPLAY=:99 ffmpeg -f x11grab -video_size 1440x900 -i :99 -frames:v 1 [workspace-path] -y 2>&1 | tail -5 && echo "done"
DISPLAY=:99 ffmpeg -f x11grab -video_size 1440x900 -i :99 -frames:v 1 -update 1 [workspace-path] -y 2>&1 | tail -3 && echo "done"

cp [workspace-path] [workspace-path]
echo "saved folder screenshot"

pkill -f eog 2>/dev/null; sleep 1
DISPLAY=:99 eog [workspace-path] &
sleep 4
DISPLAY=:99 ffmpeg -f x11grab -video_size 1440x900 -i :99 -frames:v 1 -update 1 [workspace-path] -y 2>&1 | tail -1
echo "done"

pkill -f eog 2>/dev/null
sleep 1
DISPLAY=:99 eog [workspace-path] &
echo "eog launched, pid=$!"
pkill -f eog 2>/dev/null; true
which eog feh gpicview display ristretto 2>/dev/null

DISPLAY=:99 ristretto [workspace-path] &
sleep 4 && DISPLAY=:99 ffmpeg -f x11grab -video_size 1440x900 -i :99 -frames:v 1 -update 1 [workspace-path] -y 2>&1 | tail -1 && echo "done"

# Click OK to dismiss the thumbnail dialog - button is at approximately x=604, y=464
DISPLAY=:99 xdotool mousemove 604 464 click 1
sleep 2
DISPLAY=:99 ffmpeg -f x11grab -video_size 1440x900 -i :99 -frames:v 1 -update 1 [workspace-path] -y 2>&1 | tail -1
echo "done"

DISPLAY=:99 xdotool key Return
sleep 1
DISPLAY=:99 ffmpeg -f x11grab -video_size 1440x900 -i :99 -frames:v 1 -update 1 [workspace-path] -y 2>&1 | tail -1
echo "done"

# Find the OK button window and click it
DISPLAY=:99 xdotool search --name "Ristretto" windowfocus
DISPLAY=:99 xdotool mousemove 604 464 && sleep 0.3 && DISPLAY=:99 xdotool click 1
sleep 2
DISPLAY=:99 ffmpeg -f x11grab -video_size 1440x900 -i :99 -frames:v 1 -update 1 [workspace-path] -y 2>&1 | tail -1
echo "done"

# Get the Ristretto window ID
WID=$(DISPLAY=:99 xdotool search --class ristretto | head -1)
echo "Window ID: $WID"
# Force focus to the window then press space/enter

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Build receipt_packet_audit.ods using odfpy."""

from odf.opendocument import OpenDocumentSpreadsheet
from odf.style import Style, TextProperties, TableColumnProperties, ParagraphProperties
from odf.table import Table, TableColumn, TableRow, TableCell
from odf.text import P
from odf import style, number

doc = OpenDocumentSpreadsheet()

# ── styles ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def make_style(doc, name, bold=False, bg=None, wrap=False, align=None):
    s = Style(name=name, family="table-cell")
    tp = {}
    if bold:
        tp["fontweight"] = "bold"
    if tp:
        s.addElement(TextProperties(**tp))
    pp = {}
    if wrap:
        pp["wrap"] = "wrap"
    if align:
        pp["textalign"] = align
    if pp:
        s.addElement(ParagraphProperties(**pp))
    doc.styles.addElement(s)
    return s

hdr_style   = make_style(doc, "Header",  bold=True)
body_style  = make_style(doc, "Body",    bold=False)
excl_style  = make_style(doc, "Excl",   bold=False)
sum_hdr     = make_style(doc, "SumHdr", bold=True)

# ── helper to add a cell ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def cell(value, style_name="Body", val_type="string"):
    tc = TableCell(valuetype=val_type, stylename=style_name)
    if val_type == "float":
        tc.setAttribute("value", str(value))
        tc.addElement(P(text=str(value)))
    else:
        tc.addElement(P(text=str(value) if value is not None else ""))
    return tc

def row(*cells):
    tr = TableRow()
    for c in cells:
        tr.addElement(c)
    return tr

# ── sheet ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
sheet = Table(name="Receipt Audit")
doc.spreadsheet.addElement(sheet)

# column widths
for w in ["4cm","2.5cm","3cm","2cm","4cm","3cm","3cm","6cm"]:
    tc = TableColumn()
    sheet.addElement(tc)

# ── header row ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
headers = [
    "Source File", "Status", "Duplicate Of", "Item Count",
    "Merchant / Label", "Category", "Total Amount", "Notes"
]
hrow = TableRow()
for h in headers:
    hrow.addElement(cell(h, style_name="Header"))
sheet.addElement(hrow)

# ── data rows ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
rows_data = [
    # (file, status, dup_of, item_count, merchant, category, total, notes)
    (
        "receipt_01.jpg", "accepted", "",
        3, "Trois Lee Jeunne (café)", "Food & Beverage", 45500,
        "Items: Real Ganache 16500, Egg Tart 13000, Pizza Toast 16000. "
        "Currency IDR (Korean-style café). MD5: 3fae40974c185cb3a210bcadf4be9618"
    ),
    (
        "receipt_02.jpg", "accepted", "",
        1, "404 Eatery & Coffee", "Food & Beverage", 23000,
        "Item: Kopi Susu Kolonel x1. Cash 50000, change 27000 (IDR). "
        "MD5: d9b1ad6c2a833d30041aad31c33eb7ec"
    ),
    (
        "receipt_03.jpg", "accepted", "",
        1, "KOI Thé", "Food & Beverage", 20000,
        "Item: S-Ovaltine 50% discount. 10% tax included (PB1 1818). "
        "MD5: 078100aee25b2ebcf9314c7c0004e81c. Original of duplicate pair."
    ),
    (
        "receipt_04.jpg", "accepted", "",
        1, "KOI Thé", "Food & Beverage", 28000,
        "Item: M-Caramel Black Tea 70% less ice. PB1=0. "
        "MD5: 07d8fa87b0128ab0fc02dd1c319554a9"
    ),
    (
        "receipt_05.jpg", "accepted", "",
        1, "Street Master (BBQ Chicken)", "Food", 41000,
        "Item: BBQ Chicken Sedang x1. Pay cash 50000, change 9000 (IDR). "
        "MD5: cff80c5e1050881c10ddfd3ba10c1cfb"
    ),
    (
        "scan_2026_07_17_b.jpg", "excluded", "receipt_03.jpg",
        1, "KOI Thé", "Food & Beverage", 20000,
        "DUPLICATE of receipt_03.jpg — byte-for-byte identical. "
        "MD5: 078100aee25b2ebcf9314c7c0004e81c. Do not count toward total."
    ),
]

for rd in rows_data:
    fname, status, dup, items, merchant, cat, total, notes = rd
    st = "Excl" if status == "excluded" else "Body"
    r = TableRow()
    r.addElement(cell(fname,     style_name=st))
    r.addElement(cell(status,    style_name=st))
    r.addElement(cell(dup,       style_name=st))
    r.addElement(cell(items,     style_name=st, val_type="float"))
    r.addElement(cell(merchant,  style_name=st))
    r.addElement(cell(cat,       style_name=st))
    r.addElement(cell(total,     style_name=st, val_type="float"))
    r.addElement(cell(notes,     style_name=st))
    sheet.addElement(r)

# blank separator
sheet.addElement(TableRow())
sheet.addElement(TableRow())

# ── summary section ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def sum_row(label, value):
    r = TableRow()
    r.addElement(cell(label, style_name="SumHdr"))
    # empty cols 2-6
    for _ in range(5):
        r.addElement(cell("", style_name="Body"))
    r.addElement(cell(value, style_name="Body",
                      val_type="float" if isinstance(value, (int, float)) else "string"))
    r.addElement(cell("", style_name="Body"))
    return r

sheet.addElement(sum_row("SUMMARY", ""))
sheet.addElement(sum_row("Accepted receipt count",      5))
sheet.addElement(sum_row("Excluded duplicate count",    1))
sheet.addElement(sum_row("Final approved total (IDR)", 45500 + 23000 + 20000 + 28000 + 41000))

out = "[workspace-path]"
doc.save(out)
print(f"Saved: {out}")

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Build receipt_packet_memo.odt using odfpy."""

from odf.opendocument import OpenDocumentText
from odf.style import Style, TextProperties, ParagraphProperties
from odf.text import P, H, LineBreak, Span
from odf import style

doc = OpenDocumentText()

# Styles
def add_para_style(doc, name, bold=False, size="12pt", margin_top="0cm", margin_bottom="0.3cm"):
    s = Style(name=name, family="paragraph")
    pp = ParagraphProperties(marginbottom=margin_bottom, margintop=margin_top)
    s.addElement(pp)
    tp_args = {"fontsize": size}
    if bold:
        tp_args["fontweight"] = "bold"
    s.addElement(TextProperties(**tp_args))
    doc.styles.addElement(s)

add_para_style(doc, "Title",   bold=True,  size="16pt", margin_bottom="0.5cm")
add_para_style(doc, "Heading2",bold=True,  size="13pt", margin_top="0.5cm", margin_bottom="0.2cm")
add_para_style(doc, "Body",    bold=False, size="11pt")
add_para_style(doc, "BulletItem", bold=False, size="11pt")

def p(text, style_name="Body"):
    para = P(stylename=style_name)
    para.addElement(Span(text=text))
    return para

def h2(text):
    return p(text, style_name="Heading2")

def blank():
    return P(stylename="Body")

# ── Document content ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
doc.text.addElement(p("VENDOR RECEIPT PACKET — AUDIT MEMO", style_name="Title"))

doc.text.addElement(p("Date: 2026-07-02"))
doc.text.addElement(p("Prepared by: OpenClaw Audit Agent"))
doc.text.addElement(p("Source packet: [workspace-path]"))
doc.text.addElement(p("Dataset: CORD-v2 (Naver CLOVA; CC BY 4.0)"))
doc.text.addElement(blank())

doc.text.addElement(h2("1. Purpose"))

    "This memo documents the results of an automated audit of a vendor receipt "
    "packet that was copied from a shared drive. The audit inspected each image "
    "file for content, detected any duplicate or near-duplicate scans, and "
    "established a final approved total across unique receipts only."
))

doc.text.addElement(h2("2. Files Reviewed"))
doc.text.addElement(p("The packet contained 6 image files (JPG):"))
files = [
    "receipt_01.jpg  —  864×1296 px,  71.9 kB",
    "receipt_02.jpg  — 1108×1478 px, 177.1 kB",
    "receipt_03.jpg  —  418×740 px,   25.4 kB",
    "receipt_04.jpg  — 2304×4096 px, 666.1 kB",
    "receipt_05.jpg  —  576×864 px,   48.1 kB",
    "scan_2026_07_17_b.jpg  —  418×740 px,  25.4 kB",
]
for f in files:
    doc.text.addElement(p(f"  • {f}"))

doc.text.addElement(h2("3. Duplicate Detection"))
doc.text.addElement(p(
    "MD5 checksums were computed for all six files. "
    "receipt_03.jpg and scan_2026_07_17_b.jpg share the identical checksum "
    "(078100aee25b2ebcf9314c7c0004e81c), confirming they are byte-for-byte "
    "duplicates — the same KOI Thé scan re-uploaded under a different filename. "
    "Visual inspection in Ristretto Image Viewer confirmed the files render "
    "identically. scan_2026_07_17_b.jpg is therefore EXCLUDED from totals."
))

doc.text.addElement(h2("4. Receipt Summary (Accepted Files)"))
doc.text.addElement(p("Five unique receipts were accepted:"))

accepted = [
    ("receipt_01.jpg", "Trois Lee Jeunne (café)",     "3 items: Real Ganache, Egg Tart, Pizza Toast",             "IDR 45,500"),
    ("receipt_02.jpg", "404 Eatery & Coffee",          "1 item: Kopi Susu Kolonel",                                "IDR 23,000"),
    ("receipt_03.jpg", "KOI Thé",                      "1 item: S-Ovaltine (50% sweetness, 10% tax included)",     "IDR 20,000"),
    ("receipt_04.jpg", "KOI Thé",                      "1 item: M-Caramel Black Tea (70% sweet, less ice)",        "IDR 28,000"),
    ("receipt_05.jpg", "Street Master (BBQ Chicken)",  "1 item: BBQ Chicken Sedang",                               "IDR 41,000"),
]
for fname, merchant, items, total in accepted:
    doc.text.addElement(p(f"  • {fname} | {merchant} | {items} | Total: {total}"))

doc.text.addElement(blank())
doc.text.addElement(p("Excluded (duplicate):"))
doc.text.addElement(p(
    "  • scan_2026_07_17_b.jpg — byte-for-byte duplicate of receipt_03.jpg (KOI Thé, IDR 20,000)"
))

doc.text.addElement(h2("5. Findings & Totals"))
doc.text.addElement(p(f"  • Accepted receipt count:       5"))
doc.text.addElement(p(f"  • Excluded duplicate count:     1"))
doc.text.addElement(p(f"  • Final approved total (IDR):   157,500"))
doc.text.addElement(blank())
doc.text.addElement(p(
    "Calculation: 45,500 + 23,000 + 20,000 + 28,000 + 41,000 = 157,500 IDR"
))

doc.text.addElement(h2("6. Recommendation"))
doc.text.addElement(p(

This memo documents the results of an automated audit of a vendor receipt

----------------------
MD5 checksums were computed for all six files.

-----------------
